description: Call to Arms Patch 11 (13 October 2021) — Season Winner Statues Unveiled, Black Zone Map Improvements, Faction Warfare UI Changes, Duel Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Season Winner Statues Unveiled
sections.searchable_text: Season Winner Statues Unveiled Blue Army

sections.heading: Black Zone Map Improvements

items.text: Season Point multipliers for Territories, Castles / Castle Outposts, and mobs

sections.searchable_text: Black Zone Map Improvements Season Point multipliers for Territories, Castles / Castle Outposts, and mobs Energy Storage by Territory

sections.heading: Faction Warfare UI Changes

items.text: Faction Warfare Player Rankings now only list players who were active within the prior week
Resolved a rare issue that caused Faction Warfare Player Rankings to display incorrectly

sections.searchable_text: Faction Warfare UI Changes Faction Warfare Player Rankings now only list players who were active within the prior week Resolved a rare issue that caused Faction Warfare Player Rankings to display incorrectly

sections.heading: Duel Changes

items.text: Duel circles now have a defined maximum height difference between participants

subitems.text: If one player exceeds a certain height/depth, the fleeing countdown will start
This is intended to fix terrain obstruction duel exploits in certain areas

sections.searchable_text: Duel Changes Duel circles now have a defined maximum height difference between participants

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Motivating Cleanse (all Arcane Staffs): Max affected targets: 5 → 10 Void (Malevolent Locus): No longer purges enemies

changes.raw_text: Motivating Cleanse (all Arcane Staffs): Max affected targets: 5 → 10
Void (Malevolent Locus): No longer purges enemies
Explosive Mine (Weeping Repeater): Damage: 230 → 270

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staff): Can now be cast at the ground and no longer requires an ally target (Blades remain on the ground area); Is now a channeled ability, and the Blade area lasts for the channel duration; The area now also continues purging enemy buffs on every hit (doesn't purge enemy HoT); Cast Range: 11m → 15m; Cast Time: 1s → 0.6s; Cast and channel are now uninterruptible; Area Radius: 6m → 5m; Area Duration: 5s → 4s; Damage Debuff per Stack: 5% → 4%; Debuff Max Stacks: 10 → 5; Cooldown now scales with Item Power: 900 Item Power: 50s1700 Item Power: 34s

changes.raw_text: Enfeeble Blades (Lifecurse Staff): Can now be cast at the ground and no longer requires an ally target (Blades remain on the ground area); Is now a channeled ability, and the Blade area lasts for the channel duration; The area now also continues purging enemy buffs on every hit (doesn't purge enemy HoT); Cast Range: 11m → 15m; Cast Time: 1s → 0.6s; Cast and channel are now uninterruptible; Area Radius: 6m → 5m; Area Duration: 5s → 4s; Damage Debuff per Stack: 5% → 4%; Debuff Max Stacks: 10 → 5; Cooldown now scales with Item Power: 900 Item Power: 50s1700 Item Power: 34s
notes: Can now be cast at the ground and no longer requires an ally target (Blades remain on the ground area)
Is now a channeled ability, and the Blade area lasts for the channel duration
The area now also continues purging enemy buffs on every hit (doesn't purge enemy HoT)
Cast and channel are now uninterruptible
Cooldown now scales with Item Power: 900 Item Power: 50s1700 Item Power: 34s

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Searing Flame (all Fire Staffs): Fixed an issue where its collision detection was unreliable at max range - this means its effective range is now increased Magma Sphere (Wildfire Staff): Projectile Speed: 7.67m/s → 11.5m/s; Cast Speed: 0.6s → 0.4s; Instant Damage: 267.43 → 296; Ignite Damage per tick: 20.06 → 3.75% of the target's Max Health

changes.raw_text: Searing Flame (all Fire Staffs): Fixed an issue where its collision detection was unreliable at max range - this means its effective range is now increased
notes: Fixed an issue where its collision detection was unreliable at max range - this means its effective range is now increased

changes.raw_text: Magma Sphere (Wildfire Staff): Projectile Speed: 7.67m/s → 11.5m/s; Cast Speed: 0.6s → 0.4s; Instant Damage: 267.43 → 296; Ignite Damage per tick: 20.06 → 3.75% of the target's Max Health

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Iron Breaker (all Hammers): Resistance Reduction: 0.14 → 0.12; Damage vs Players: 120 → 90 (Damage vs Mobs stays unchanged) Power Geyser (all Hammers): Cooldown: 8s → 10s Tackle (Great Hammer): Stun Duration: 2.35s → 2.10s

changes.raw_text: Iron Breaker (all Hammers): Resistance Reduction: 0.14 → 0.12; Damage vs Players: 120 → 90 (Damage vs Mobs stays unchanged)
Power Geyser (all Hammers): Cooldown: 8s → 10s
Tackle (Great Hammer): Stun Duration: 2.35s → 2.10s

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Equipping any Holy Staff reduces all damage output by 50% Smite (all Holy Staffs): Now increases the caster's damage by 50% for 8s Holy Flash (all Holy Staffs): Cooldown: 0s → 3s; Cast Time: 0.8s → 0.4s; Hit Delay: 0s → 0.4s; Heal: 34 → 130; Removed the additional 10% Healing per target effect Holy Explosion (Great Holy Staff): Energy Cost per tick: 3.6 → 4.0 Celestial Sphere (Redemption Staff): The cast is now uninterruptible Divine Intervention (Hallowfall): Cooldown Reduction when Healing an ally: 35% → 40%

changes.ability: Equipping any Holy Staff reduces all damage output by 50%:
changes.raw_text: Equipping any Holy Staff reduces all damage output by 50%
Smite (all Holy Staffs): Now increases the caster's damage by 50% for 8s
notes: Now increases the caster's damage by 50% for 8s

changes.raw_text: Holy Flash (all Holy Staffs): Cooldown: 0s → 3s; Cast Time: 0.8s → 0.4s; Hit Delay: 0s → 0.4s; Heal: 34 → 130; Removed the additional 10% Healing per target effect
notes: Removed the additional 10% Healing per target effect

changes.raw_text: Holy Explosion (Great Holy Staff): Energy Cost per tick: 3.6 → 4.0
Celestial Sphere (Redemption Staff): The cast is now uninterruptible
Divine Intervention (Hallowfall): Cooldown Reduction when Healing an ally: 35% → 40%

stats.name: Cooldown Reduction when Healing an ally

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Sacred Ground (all Maces): Cast Time: 0.8s → 0.6s; Enemies inside the area are now slowed by 20% Guard Rune (all Maces): Allies inside the area are now immune to forced movement and stun; Resistance Increase: 0.20 → 0.25; Removed the Healing Increased bonus Battle Howl (Heavy Mace): Cooldown: 20s → 15s

changes.raw_text: Sacred Ground (all Maces): Cast Time: 0.8s → 0.6s; Enemies inside the area are now slowed by 20%
notes: Enemies inside the area are now slowed by 20%

changes.raw_text: Guard Rune (all Maces): Allies inside the area are now immune to forced movement and stun; Resistance Increase: 0.20 → 0.25; Removed the Healing Increased bonus
notes: Allies inside the area are now immune to forced movement and stun

changes.raw_text: Battle Howl (Heavy Mace): Cooldown: 20s → 15s

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Equipping any Nature Staff reduces all damage output by 50% Thorns (all Nature Staffs): Now increases the caster's damage by 10% for 10s (stacks up to 5 times) Spirit Animal (Rampant Staff): Cast Range: at caster → 12m; Now cast direction can be selected independent of cast position; Base Heal per tick: 12 → 13.5

changes.ability: Equipping any Nature Staff reduces all damage output by 50%:
changes.raw_text: Equipping any Nature Staff reduces all damage output by 50%
Thorns (all Nature Staffs): Now increases the caster's damage by 10% for 10s (stacks up to 5 times)
notes: Now increases the caster's damage by 10% for 10s (stacks up to 5 times)

changes.raw_text: Spirit Animal (Rampant Staff): Cast Range: at caster → 12m; Now cast direction can be selected independent of cast position; Base Heal per tick: 12 → 13.5
notes: Now cast direction can be selected independent of cast position

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Spirit Spear Charge (all Spears): Normal Attack Damage Increase: 40% → 32%

changes.raw_text: Spirit Spear Charge (all Spears): Normal Attack Damage Increase: 40% → 32%

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade): 2 stacks - Silence Duration: 0.8s → 1.4s; 3 stacks - Additional Damage: 48 → 94 Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair): 0 Stack Damage: 75 → 84; 1 Stack Damage: 119 → 134; 2 Stack Damage: 179 → 201; 3 Stack Damage: 254 → 285

changes.raw_text: Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade): 2 stacks - Silence Duration: 0.8s → 1.4s; 3 stacks - Additional Damage: 48 → 94
Soulless Stream (Galatine Pair): 0 Stack Damage: 75 → 84; 1 Stack Damage: 119 → 134; 2 Stack Damage: 179 → 201; 3 Stack Damage: 254 → 285

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Frost Walk (Druid Sandals): Move Speed Increase: 30% → 45%

changes.raw_text: Frost Walk (Druid Sandals): Move Speed Increase: 30% → 45%

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Tower Chariot: Health Factor: 3.6 → 5.3 Energy Cloud (Tower Chariot): Standtime: 0.3s → 0s; Removed Energy Cost Reduction; Instead, it now restores 3 energy per second (stacks up to 2 times) Toxic Crystal Waste (Tower Chariot): Standtime: 1s → 0.6s Tower Shield (Tower Chariot): Shield no longer restores energy; Shield now also affects mounts

changes.raw_text: Tower Chariot: Health Factor: 3.6 → 5.3
Energy Cloud (Tower Chariot): Standtime: 0.3s → 0s; Removed Energy Cost Reduction; Instead, it now restores 3 energy per second (stacks up to 2 times)
notes: Instead, it now restores 3 energy per second (stacks up to 2 times)

changes.raw_text: Toxic Crystal Waste (Tower Chariot): Standtime: 1s → 0.6s
Tower Shield (Tower Chariot): Shield no longer restores energy; Shield now also affects mounts

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed a rare issue where Wall of Flames triggered rapidly when cast close to a wall
Corrected effect area length display for Spirit Animal (Rampant Staff)
Activation buff of Poison (Mage Cowl) can now be purged as intended
Adjusted Soul Shaker (Grailseeker) tooltip and spell indicator to show correct range
Fixed an issue where spell slot cooldowns were sometimes wrong after failed cast attempts (e.g. in connection with Soul Shaker spell)

items.text: Fixed an issue where /suicide would sometimes not work when knocked down
Fixed an issue that prevented crafting of Ballistas when it should have been unlocked
Fixed an issue that prevented deleting character names with non-alphanumeric characters; corrected entry prompt to allow only alphanumeric characters
[MOBILE] Fixed an issue where side menus would overlap Premium and Gold menus - opening these menus now closes others
Additional graphical, audio, animation, terrain, UI, and localization fixes

sections.searchable_text: Fixes Spell fixes Fixed an issue where /suicide would sometimes not work when knocked down Fixed an issue that prevented crafting of Ballistas when it should have been unlocked Fixed an issue that prevented deleting character names with non-alphanumeric characters; corrected entry prompt to allow only alphanumeric characters [MOBILE] Fixed an issue where side menus would overlap Premium and Gold menus - opening these menus now closes others Additional graphical, audio, animation, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
